testsuite.name: tests.LoginTest
testsuite.system-out: ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element input is displayed. Entered Text Admin in the element ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element input is displayed. Entered Text admin123 in the element ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element button is displayed. ✔ Clicked Element [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (0754e3d2e75d2750f6fb89b16a8d59ce)] -> xpath: //button[@type='submit']] Successfully! ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element img is displayed.

✔ ASSERT PASSED: element img is displayed. ✔ Clicked Element [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (0754e3d2e75d2750f6fb89b16a8d59ce)] -> css selector: img.oxd-userdropdown-img] Successfully! ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element a is displayed. ✔ Clicked Element [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (0754e3d2e75d2750f6fb89b16a8d59ce)] -> xpath: //a[contains(text(),'Logout')]] Successfully! ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element button is displayed.
